name: SSR Mining Inc.
description: SSR Mining Inc. is a leading intermediate gold company with a diversified portfolio of high-quality assets located in some of the world's most prolific mining jurisdictions. The company's primary operations include the Çöpler Gold Mine in Turkey, the Marigold gold mine in Nevada, USA, the Seabee gold operation in Saskatchewan, Canada, and the Puna silver operations in Jujuy, Argentina. SSR Mining is focused on delivering sustainable value through operational excellence, disciplined capital allocation, and a commitment to environmental and social responsibility across its global footprint.
